title: Ubiquiti Outdoor Power Cable, 12 AWG, 305m
description: PC-12 PowerCable is an all-weather, UV-resistant cable designed for outdoor installations. PowerCable uses a fire-resistant, polyethylene jacket (FT-1) and operates in a temperature range from -30 to 90 ° C. PowerCable features 12 AWG stranded tinned copper conductors, capacitance of 28 pF/ft @ 1 kHz, DCR of 1.77ohm/305m @ 20 ° C, voltage rating at 300V, and impedance of 56ohms
